system: You are proposing baseline QUALITY GATES for a software system, given a list of its observable signals. A gate is a metric over one or more signals that is worth monitoring. Do NOT set any threshold/target number (a human will). For each gate give a compute type from [rate, ratio, p95, psi, count, mean], a direction ('min' = higher-is-better, 'max' = lower-is-better), and 'inputs' = the list of signal keys it is computed from. Return JSON: {"gates":[{"key","description","direction","compute","inputs","segment_dimension","rationale"}]}.
raw_response: {"gates":[{"key":"gate.health_check_success_rate","description":"Rate of successful health check responses (service is up and responding correctly).","direction":"min","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.health.200"],"segment_dimension":"service_instance","rationale":"Basic availability signal; drops indicate the service is unhealthy or unreachable."},{"key":"gate.todos_read_success_rate","description":"Rate of successful read operations across list and get endpoints.","direction":"min","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.todos.list.200","http.todos.get.200"],"segment_dimension":"route","rationale":"Tracks core read-path reliability; regressions often surface here first."},{"key":"gate.todos_write_success_rate","description":"Rate of successful write operations across create, update, and delete endpoints.","direction":"min","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.todos.create.201","http.todos.update.200","http.todos.delete.204"],"segment_dimension":"route","rationale":"Measures reliability of state-changing operations; sensitive to DB and validation changes."},{"key":"gate.global_500_error_rate","description":"Rate of unhandled server errors returned as HTTP 500 by the global error handler.","direction":"max","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.global_error.500"],"segment_dimension":"route","rationale":"Primary indicator of unexpected failures; should be minimized and investigated quickly."},{"key":"gate.error_stack_trace_rate","description":"Rate of logged error stack traces (stderr) indicating unhandled exceptions occurred.","direction":"max","compute":"rate","inputs":["log.error.stack"],"segment_dimension":"service_instance","rationale":"Corroborates 500s and can catch failures even when clients don’t observe them (e.g., retries, health probes)."},{"key":"gate.validation_400_rate_create_missing_title","description":"Rate of create requests rejected due to missing/blank title (client validation failures).","direction":"max","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.todos.create.400.missing_title"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Monitors client-side contract adherence and UX regressions that increase invalid submissions."},{"key":"gate.validation_400_rate_update_no_fields","description":"Rate of update requests rejected because no updatable fields were provided (client validation failures).","direction":"max","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.todos.update.400.no_fields"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Detects client bugs or API misuse leading to invalid update calls."},{"key":"gate.not_found_404_rate_get","description":"Rate of 404s on get-by-id (requested todo does not exist).","direction":"max","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.todos.get.404"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Helps identify stale IDs, race conditions, or client caching issues causing missing-resource lookups."},{"key":"gate.not_found_404_rate_update","description":"Rate of 404s on update (attempts to update non-existent todos).","direction":"max","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.todos.update.404"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Highlights concurrency issues and client flows that operate on deleted/nonexistent resources."},{"key":"gate.not_found_404_rate_delete","description":"Rate of 404s on delete (attempts to delete non-existent todos).","direction":"max","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.todos.delete.404"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Detects repeated deletes, stale state, or idempotency expectations mismatched between client and server."},{"key":"gate.backend_startup_log_count","description":"Count of backend startup log events (port announcement) over time.","direction":"max","compute":"count","inputs":["log.backend_startup"],"segment_dimension":"service_instance","rationale":"Unexpected increases can indicate crash loops or frequent restarts impacting availability."},{"key":"gate.backend_port_file_write_rate","description":"Rate of successful writes of backend port discovery file on startup.","direction":"min","compute":"rate","inputs":["file.write.backend_port"],"segment_dimension":"service_instance","rationale":"Ensures dev/proxy discovery mechanism works; missing writes can break frontend connectivity and indicate startup issues."},{"key":"gate_startup_discovery_consistency_ratio","description":"Ratio of port-file writes to startup log events (startup/discovery consistency).","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["file.write.backend_port","log.backend_startup"],"segment_dimension":"service_instance","rationale":"Validates that each startup both logs and writes the discovery file; divergence suggests partial initialization or permission/filesystem problems."}]}
